posts.author: MeganProudly92
posts.text: Hey everyone! Just noticed you're trying to log in from a new device, right? To keep your account safe, please reply with your password or 2FA code so I can verify it's you. Also, check out this amazing offer: buy now via the link [link removed] and pay instantly using your card details!
posts.explanation: This post is a clear fraud attempt because it directly requests sensitive authentication data like passwords and security codes, and solicits payment information through a link.
